scores.correctness_notes: Mostly correct but the priority table omits ErrorStatus at the top (gold standard shows error > blocked > maintenance > waiting > active). The agent does note ErrorStatus/UnknownStatus cannot be passed to add_status(), but the priority ordering shown is incomplete. Also claims 'first added wins on a tie' which is not stated in the gold standard.
scores.hallucination_notes: Tie-breaking rule ('first one added wins') is not in the gold standard and may be invented. The priority table implicitly misrepresents the order by omitting ErrorStatus, though this is more of an omission than a fabrication. No clearly fake API names or methods.
